teachingHint: Your child is learning the split digraph 'a-e' (as in 'cake'). The 'e' at the end of the word jumps over the consonant to make the 'a' say its name — the long /ai/ sound. Help your child spot 'a_e' and blend: c-a-k-e → cake, m-a-k-e → make. The underlined words are for your child to read — you can help with the rest!
